loop1.title: UPS Capacity
loop1.note: Showing load factor against rated capacity; nameplate:rated_kva is unknown for this asset, so kVA and kW scores are honest-blanked. Current score uses average current load factor as a proxy.

loop1.title: UPS Load
loop1.note: Showing active power load and PF; headroom is omitted because the asset's nameplate rated_kva is unknown (empty denominator).

loop1.title: Output Load & Capacity — Composite
loop1.note: Showing total active power as a proxy for UPS load readiness; per-phase power is not used for the composite score. Bypass voltage and transfers are not measured by this meter and are omitted.
